title: Open VSX publish workflow on main (v0.1.0 tag)

source.subject: fix(ci): avoid Windows decode crash in Open VSX namespace check

body:
Fixes Windows decode crash in Open VSX **namespace check** — last CI fix before superrepo tag **v0.1.0**.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`f777b79`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f777b79)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): avoid Windows decode crash in Open VSX namespace check
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Terminal commit for **v01-open-vsx** and v0.1 cutoff (`f777b79`).
